  -n, --outputFileName      (Default: TestResults.html) name for the html file

  -o, --outputDirectory     (Default: .) target directory for the html file

  -w, --workingDirectory    (Default: .) directory to scan recursive for trx
                            files

  -t, --templateFile        path of template file used to create the html file

  -a, --all                 (Default: false) process all matched trx files,
                            otherwise only latest trx file per folder
